Deerkit is silly and tbh i hate Subkit/Medspace i can go on a whole rant on why i hate it and tbh i view it as a darkship not sure if it is but my main reasons are: Subspace literally pulled medkit's eye out and medkit literally is the reason of why subspace's face is somewhat disfigurated, and it pisses me off how people just say "enemies to lovers!!" no, medkit literally wants subspace dead and vice-versa it pisses me off how glazed this ship is, while no hate to the shippers of it i geniunly won't interact with you if you like this ship as this ship makes me geniunly uncomfortable
